sqlMap.select: SELECT b.tenant_id, a.lang, a.timeZone, b.department, b.description, b.description2, b.physicaldeliveryofficename, b.company, b.company2, b.cn, b.displayName, b.displayName2, b.title, b.title2, b.extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, b.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, b.mail as email, b.telephonenumber, TO_CHAR(b.lastlogin, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastLogin, b.extensionattribute7, b.extensionattribute8 FROM TBL_USERMOBILEINFO a right join TBL_USERMASTER b ON a.userid = b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id WHERE b.cn = #userId# AND b.tenant_id = (select tenant_id from TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME WHERE server_name = #serverName#)

SELECT * FROM (
(SELECT DOCTITLE as title, STARTDATE + #offset#/(24*60) AS STARTDATE, 1 as module,
WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2 as WRITERNAME, VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.DOCID as APPRID, APRMEMBERSN as APRMEMBERSN, '' as BOARDID, '' as BOARDITEMID, TO_CHAR(URGENTAPPROVAL) as BOARDGUBUN, 'APR' as "MODE", ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC) rnum FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 AND APRMEMBERID IN
#userIDS[]#
AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1 AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#sessionDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
UNION
(SELECT DOCTITLE as title, STARTDATE + #offset#/(24*60) AS STARTDATE, 1 as module,
WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2 as WRITERNAME, VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.DOCID as APPRID, APRMEMBERSN as APRMEMBERSN, '' as BOARDID, '' as BOARDITEMID, TO_CHAR(URGENTAPPROVAL) as BOARDGUBUN, 'END' as "MODE", ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC) rnum FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 AND APRMEMBERID IN
#userIDS[]#
AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1 AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#sessionDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
UNION
( SELECT A.TITLE, TO_DATE(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset#/(24*60) AS STARTDATE, 4 as module,
WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2 as WRITERNAME,
'' as APPRID, A.IMPORTANCE as APRMEMBERSN, TO_CHAR(A.BOARDID), TO_CHAR(A.ITEMID) as BOARDITEMID, TO_CHAR(P.GUBUN) as BOARDGUBUN, '' as "MODE", ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC) rnum FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - 5, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE < #sessionDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND S.USERID = #userID# AND S.READDATE > TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - 5))) ) WHERE rnum <= #listCnt#

SELECT b.tenant_id, a.lang, a.timeZone, b.department, b.description, b.description2, b.physicaldeliveryofficename, b.company, b.company2, b.cn, b.displayName, b.displayName2, b.title, b.title2, b.extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, b.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, b.mail as email, b.telephonenumber, TO_CHAR(b.lastlogin, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastLogin, b.extensionattribute7, b.extensionattribute8 FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO a right join TBL_USERMASTER b ON a.userid = b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id WHERE b.cn = #userId# AND b.tenant_id = (select tenant_id from TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME WHERE server_name = #serverName#)
SELECT userId, timeZone, lang, mainType, listCnt, useSecurity, tenant_id FROM TBL_USERMOBILEINFO WHERE userid = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_USERMOBILEINFO SET LANG = #lang#
,TIMEZONE = #timeZone#
,MAINTYPE = #mainType# ,LISTCNT = #listCnt# ,USESECURITY = #useSecurity# WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERMOBILEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND USERID = #userID#
